strategy: Know the opening: on round 1 the Gold Dragon casts Shadow Sentinel on itself - 75% intercept, 100 critical block, -30% incoming damage - so most single-target damage aimed at the Sultan gets soaked by a tanky dragon.
Plan an AoE kill: blades plus Feint, then one all-enemy hit that clears Sultan, Gold Dragon, and Steeleton together instead of fighting the intercept.
Hit with Myth if you can (+20%). He resists Storm 40%, so Storm wizards bring a prism.
He starts with only 1 pip, so the early rounds are safe - stack blades for 2-3 rounds and hit.
cheatNotes: The Gold Dragon shields the fight from round 1: it intercepts 75% of damage aimed at its allies, blocks crits, and takes 30% less damage itself. Either burn the dragon down first or build to one big all-enemy hit.
